'''fazate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:urbanly|urbanly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-z-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:urbanly|urbanly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fazate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:fazate|fazate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fazatesher|fazatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fazatesherĂ«m|fazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fazatero|fazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fazateshĂ«|fazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fazateshĂ«m|fazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifazatero|gokifazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifazateshĂ«|gokifazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifazateshĂ«m|gokifazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofazankerom|gofazankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofazankeshĂ«|gofazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofazankeshĂ«m|gofazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofazankeya|gofazankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fazaterom|fazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fazatemu|fazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fazateya|fazateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifazaterom|gokifazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifazatemu|gokifazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifazateya|gokifazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:fazazate|fazazate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fazazatesher|fazazatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fazazatesherĂ«m|fazazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fazazatero|fazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fazazateshĂ«|fazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fazazateshĂ«m|fazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifazazatero|gokifazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifazazateshĂ«|gokifazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifazazateshĂ«m|gokifazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofazazankerom|gofazazankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofazazankeshĂ«|gofazazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofazazankeshĂ«m|gofazazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofazazankeya|gofazazankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fazazaterom|fazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fazazatemu|fazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fazazateya|fazazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifazazaterom|gokifazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifazazatemu|gokifazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifazazateya|gokifazazateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:fĂŠzĂŠte|fĂŠzĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fĂŠzĂŠtesher|fĂŠzĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m|fĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fĂŠzĂŠtero|fĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|fĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|fĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifĂŠzĂŠtero|gokifĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|gokifĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|gokifĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofĂŠzĂŠnkerom|gofĂŠzĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«|gofĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gofĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofĂŠzĂŠnkeya|gofĂŠzĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fĂŠzĂŠterom|fĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠzĂŠtemu|fĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fĂŠzĂŠteya|fĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifĂŠzĂŠterom|gokifĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifĂŠzĂŠtemu|gokifĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifĂŠzĂŠteya|gokifĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:fafzafte|fafzafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fafzaftesher|fafzaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafzaftesherĂ«m|fafzaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fafzaftero|fafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fafzafteshĂ«|fafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafzafteshĂ«m|fafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifafzaftero|gokifafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifafzafteshĂ«|gokifafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifafzafteshĂ«m|gokifafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofafzafnkerom|gofafzafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofafzafnkeshĂ«|gofafzafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofafzafnkeshĂ«m|gofafzafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofafzafnkeya|gofafzafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fafzafterom|fafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafzaftemu|fafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fafzafteya|fafzafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifafzafterom|gokifafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifafzaftemu|gokifafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifafzafteya|gokifafzafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
